protein_name: Exhibits microtubule-destabilizing activity. Belongs to the stathmin family. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: axon; cytoplasm; Golgi apparatus; growth cone; neuron projection
raw_fields.Biological Process: microtubule depolymerization; neuron projection development; regulation of microtubule polymerization or depolymerization
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: MGC111012; RB3; stathmin 4; Stathmin-4; stathmin-like 4; Stathmin-like protein B3; stathmin-like-protein RB3; STMN4
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.76 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
